description: Implement a 'Shoppable Content' feature by creating a new content type called 'Editorial Review' (machine name: editorial_review). This content type must include a field named 'Merchandise' (machine name: field_merchandise) referencing a single Commerce Product. Configure the content display so the referenced merchandise appears as a teaser. Create and publish an 'Editorial Review' node titled 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Deep Dive' referencing the 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' product.
